task_completion.description: Open NCH Copper Point of Sale and navigate to the inventory or items list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NCH Copper Point of Sale application window is open and the Items or Inventory section is visible.
A new item dialog or inventory list showing the product name 'Organic Honey Jar'.
A new item dialog or inventory list showing the product name 'Oat Milk Liter'.
A new item dialog or inventory list showing the product name 'Almond Croissant'.

task_completion.description: Attempt to assign the specified images to the new products from the Product_Photos directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image selection dialog opened in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Product_Photos\' or the item properties showing an image attached. (Note: The images might be missing due to a defective environment; award points if the agent navigates to the correct directory to look for them).

task_completion.description: Export the updated inventory to the specified CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or export dialog saving a file named 'inventory_update_verification.csv' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\', or a file explorer window showing the successfully created CSV file.

integrity.description: The agent used the NCH Copper POS graphical interface to create the items.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Copper POS menus and item creation dialogs, rather than using a terminal or script to inject data.

integrity.description: The agent exported the CSV using the Copper POS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export action should originate from the Copper POS application's reporting or export features, not from manually typing the CSV contents in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of Notepad or other text editors being used to manually construct the 'inventory_update_verification.csv' file from scratch.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected items: 'Organic Honey Jar' (honey.jpg), 'Oat Milk Liter' (oat_milk.jpg), and 'Almond Croissant' (croissant.jpg). Image directory: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Product_Photos\. Export path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\inventory_update_verification.csv. NOTE: The task environment is known to be defective; the setup script is missing, meaning the required product images are never generated. Please award points for the image assignment step if the agent correctly navigates to the Product_Photos directory and attempts to find/upload the images, even if they are missing.
